User-agent: *
Allow: /
TDM-Reservation: 1

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://debelingoconangel.web.app/sitemap.xml

# Block common non-content paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /.well-known/

# AI Crawlers - Prohibited from mining content
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /
